title: Chapter 8 - Images
description: Check image tag usage and accessibility.

questions.prompt: Which attribute provides the image file location?

explanations.overview: The src attribute points to the image resource.

byOptionId.src: Correct — src specifies the image URL to load.
byOptionId.alt: Incorrect — alt provides alternative text, not the file path.
byOptionId.href: Incorrect — href is used for anchors, not image sources.
byOptionId.title: Incorrect — title offers tooltip text, not the image location.

options.label: It helps blind users and describes the image if it fails to load

explanations.overview: Alt text supports accessibility and provides fallback information.

byOptionId.accessibility: Correct — alt text helps assistive tech and shows when images fail to load.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect — alt is not for styling; CSS handles styles.
byOptionId.link: Incorrect — alt does not create links; <a> does that.
byOptionId.download: Incorrect — alt does not cause downloading of the image.
